stemHtml: The two main design functions of SSR Mode S are…

options.a: the elimination of ground to air communications and the introduction of automatic separation between aircraft using TCAS II.
options.b: collision avoidance using TCAS II and improved HF communication capability.
options.c: continuous automatic position reporting using GPS satellites and collision avoidance using TCAS II.
options.d: air to ground and ground to air data link communications and improved ATC aircraft surveillance capability.
